description_long: This is an adult male figure with a muscular build, standing upright with arms slightly outstretched. He is dressed in a fitted, long-sleeve shirt tucked into slim pants, secured with a belt at the waist. The figure wears sturdy, heavy-soled boots, suggesting readiness for walking or standing for extended periods. His head is bald, and his facial features are clean-shaven, giving a neat and well-groomed appearance. The clothing is simple and functional, suitable for everyday urban environments. The overall look is that of a modern, casually dressed pedestrian.
description: A bald adult male in a fitted long-sleeve shirt, slim pants, and boots, standing upright with arms slightly outstretched.
description_view_0: Front view showing the face, chest, and full frontal details of the shirt, belt, and pants.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the head, nose, and the side seam of the clothing.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, shoulders, and the fit of the shirt and pants from behind.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile of the face, ear, and the side of the body and boots.
attribute_clothing_type: fitted long-sleeve shirt, slim pants, and a belt
